[Calling write_report(title="Project Helios Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary", content="# Project Helios Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary\n\nSource: `/shared/config/helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`  \nLast updated: 2026-03-28\n\n## Patient dosing summary\n\n| Patient ID | Age | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated dose (mg) | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance (mL/min) | Notes |\n|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|\n| CU-001 | 34 months | 12.4 | 0.15 | 1.86 | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 | Stable. Tumor regression 22% at last scan. |\n| CU-002 | 18 months | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |\n| CU-003 | 51 months | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |\n\n## Brief assessment\n\n- The dosing file appears internally consistent across all three compassionate-use patients.\n- CU-001 and CU-002 are documented as clinically stable/responding.\n- CU-003 is newly enrolled, so there is less longitudinal context available.\n\n## Caveat on PK model stability\n\nThis file contains patient-specific dosing parameters and PK clearance values, but it does **not** include model-validation outputs, recent run logs, or monitoring metrics. Based on this file alone, there are no obvious dosing anomalies, but I cannot conclusively verify overall PK model stability without current validation or monitoring data.\n")]Yes — I got the dosing info.

Quick summary for Dr. Martinez:

| Patient | Weight | Dose | Calculated dose | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|
| CU-001 | 12.4 kg | 0.15 mg/kg | 1.86 mg | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 mL/min |
| CU-002 | 9.1 kg | 0.12 mg/kg | 1.09 mg | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 mL/min |
| CU-003 | 15.7 kg | 0.18 mg/kg | 2.83 mg | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 mL/min |

Notes:
- CU-001: Stable; tumor regression 22% at last scan
- CU-002: Responding well; weight gain improving
- CU-003: New enrollment; first dose given 2026-03-27

On PK model stability:
- Fact: The dosing file looks internally consistent and doesn’t show any obvious parameter anomalies.
- Fact: The patient notes for CU-001 and CU-002 suggest stable/positive clinical response; CU-003 is too new for much trend data.
- Limitation: I can’t fully verify overall PK model stability from the dosing config alone, because it doesn’t include validation results, monitoring outputs, or recent run diagnostics.

I also saved a report document titled:
**“Project Helios Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary”**

If you want, I can reformat this into a shorter clinician-facing note or prepare an email draft for Dr. Martinez.
